events.title: ICML (International Conference on Machine Learning) 2026
events.description: ICML 2026 will bring together top machine learning researchers and practitioners for a week of cutting-edge presentations, hands-on tutorials, and specialized workshops exploring the latest breakthroughs in the field.

events.title: Brainrot Lecture: The Psychology of Attention in a Digital World with Dr. Sarah Shepherd
events.description: Dr. Sarah Shepherd, a UC Berkeley psychologist whose research on digital attention has been adopted by Common Sense Media, will break down the psychology behind why platforms keep us scrolling and what that actually means for how our brains work. Expect real research, uncomfortable questions, and a deep dive into whether your attention span is actually doomed or if there's more to the story.

events.title: AI Tinkerers - Columbus July Meetup [AI Tinkerers - Columbus]
events.description: The AI Tinkerers meetup will bring together hands-on AI practitioners for demo presentations and networking, highlighting cutting-edge experiments and developments in AI technology.

events.title: Builders Night
events.description: Builders Night brings together people working on projects—from software to art to businesses—for focused, side-by-side work sessions where you'll build momentum and get unstuck with the support of other makers in the room. Expect deep focus, genuine connection, and a chance to share what you're creating with people who actually get it.

events.title: HackwithBay 3.0
events.description: HackwithBay 3.0 will bring together experienced hackers, designers, and innovators for an intense 8-hour session focused on building thoughtful productivity agents with expert mentorship and industry recognition. Participants will tackle real challenges, network with passionate problem-solvers, and compete for prizes while demoing projects to industry leaders.

events.title: Chaat Maxxing: Launch Night by PromptQL
events.description: PromptQL will celebrate the eve of their GA launch with an insider preview featuring live demos of their AI platform, a screening of their launch film, and plenty of chaat and chai—all bringing together founders, investors, and builders curious about the future of AI-powered teamwork.

events.title: OpenAI Codex Event at Bright Data
events.description: Developers and founders will gather to dive into OpenAI Codex workflows and hands-on exploration of AI-assisted software development, swapping real projects and insights with fellow builders actively experimenting with coding agents. Expect practical demos, peer discussion, and food while exploring how AI tools are reshaping the way software gets shipped.

events.title: Agent Experience Demo Night @ Auth0 (#5th Edition)
events.description: Sapient and Okta are hosting an Agent Experience Night where AI and API companies will demo their latest agent-ready tools and platforms, with past participants including OpenAI-acquired Statsig, Nvidia-acquired Groq, and Okta-acquired Auth0. Expect live AI demonstrations, speaker sessions, and networking with technical founders, developers, and investors exploring the future of agent-integrated development tools.

events.title: LP & GP Dinner with aiRaiz & Founders Bay
events.description: An evening bringing together veteran funders, capital allocators, and founders to dig into fundraising dynamics, market trends, and where money's actually flowing across private markets—featuring seasoned partners from Suncoast Ventures, Decibel Partners, BDev Ventures, and other established firms diving into today's investment landscape with candid perspectives from both LPs and GPs.

events.title: Punk Software Hack Night: Build Tools That Work for You
events.description: Build your own tools and reclaim control from software designed to exploit you—this hack night brings together coders, designers, writers, and anyone fed up with the status quo to prototype punk software powered by AI, with Kanjun Qiu (Imbue CEO) kicking things off and no prior programming experience required.

events.title: Andera x Reducto: GeoGuessr Olympics
events.description: Geo enthusiasts will battle it out in a GeoGuessr competition while diving into international cuisine and unexpected surprises, with Reducto and Andera—leaders in AI automation and enterprise-scale document intelligence—hosting the showdown.

events.title: Founder Dinner
events.description: Series A+ founders building in AI will gather for an evening of real talk on fundraising, GTM, and scaling strategies with peers who've been in the trenches, complete with a 3-course dinner and insights from builders behind some of the country's fastest-growing companies.

events.title: Claude Code Demos: Building the State of the Art
events.description: Building the State of the Art will gather experienced users of agentic tools like Claude Code and Codex for live workflow demos and collaborative working sessions, perfect for AI builders eager to refine their practices and exchange cutting-edge techniques.

events.title: Women in Tech, Fintech, AI, Startups, Networking Event & Elevator Pitch
events.description: Startup founders, tech professionals, and entrepreneurs across fintech, AI, and women-in-tech will gather to pitch ideas, swap stories, and explore collaboration opportunities with investors, researchers, and industry leaders. It's the perfect setup to level up your network, find mentors, and discover your next big partnership or investment opportunity.

events.title: Coffee Club | Deep Tech: From Research to Company
events.description: Early-stage B2B and AI founders, especially from underrepresented groups, will connect with seasoned investors and the Forum Ventures team—experts behind 65+ SaaS investments and an innovative AI venture studio—in an intimate coffee meetup designed for meaningful networking.

events.title: AI Engineers: July
events.description: The July San Francisco AI Engineers Tech Talk will bring together top AI professionals to dive into the latest advancements and share expert insights in artificial intelligence. It's set to be a prime opportunity for engineers and AI specialists to connect and elevate their skills.

events.title: Build with Campfire and Ramp MCP
events.description: Accountants and finance leaders will explore automating month-end close workflows using Campfire and Ramp's AI tools through hands-on sandbox training, followed by networking with the product teams and fellow finance professionals pushing AI boundaries.

events.title: AI After Hours
events.description: GTM leaders will hear from Mark Ripley, VP of Sales at FreshWorks, on how to actually operationalize AI across prospecting, RevOps, and customer growth—plus get the inside scoop on what's working for top revenue teams scaling AI-powered motions. Expect practical takeaways, real talk with fellow GTM operators, and drinks to cap off the week.

events.title: Private: Founders & Funders — Candle Atelier Night ft. Founder & CEO, BestSign
events.description: Women founders, funders, and allies will gather for an evening of candle-making and fireside conversation with Joy Wan, CEO of BestSign, diving into the realities of building global SaaS companies and strategies for meaningfully supporting women entrepreneurs.

events.title: The AI Stack in Practice: Live Demos from Teams Building AI in Production
events.description: Snowflake and Hetz Ventures will host an evening where founders, engineers, and data leaders will dive into live demos and technical discussions on deploying AI systems at scale, featuring insights from teams at Band, Upriver, and Nimble on building production-ready AI infrastructure. The event will showcase Snowflake's AI roadmap alongside real-world lessons from the frontlines, wrapped up with networking over food and drinks.

events.title: B2B AI Founder/VC Dinner
events.description: Founders and VCs at the forefront of AI innovation will converge for candid conversations on what actually moves the needle in funding, plus dinner and unfiltered networking with principals from NextSummit Capital Partners, BDev Ventures, and other heavyweight investors actively backing the next generation of AI companies.

events.title: Bay Area Frontier Research Club #13 | AGI House SF (dinner + paper discussion)
events.description: Experimental researchers, computational scientists, and research engineers will gather to rigorously dissect how AI is transforming the scientific research process through curated paper presentations and substantive critique on everything from hypothesis generation to reproducibility. Hosted by Frontier Syndicate, Hexo Labs, and Ascension, the evening will feature minimal presentations and maximum discussion time—perfect for anyone who's ever felt research could move faster.

events.title: “AI Infra and Robotics” VC Insights• Founder Pitches
events.description: Three seasoned venture investors—including a GP at Solaris Venture Partners who bridges U.S.-Asia innovation and a Venture Partner at HPE with exits under his belt—will share fundraising insights and judge pitched startups at this science-and-venture showcase featuring curated tech founders, live feedback, and networking with ecosystem leaders.

events.title: CypherPunk: Privacy and AI Builders' Night
events.description: An evening exploring how cypherpunk principles translate into real products through demos and hands-on building, with conversations spanning AI agents, privacy tech, payments, and open finance—plus an optional Cyberdecks 101 workshop for those wanting to dive deeper into hardware.

events.title: EdgeM8: B2B Partnership Mixer
events.description: Founders and revenue leaders will connect over market strategy and growth opportunities, with conversations spanning distribution partnerships, sales acceleration, and tech stack solutions—all fueled by cocktails and Uyghur meatpies.

events.title: AI Tinkerers: July GTM Engineering Track w/ Attio
events.description: AI Tinkerers is bringing together builders, platform engineers, and technical founders to dig into GTM engineering—where growth mechanics meet application architecture—with live code demos showcasing real implementations of validation pipelines, programmatic distribution, and automated testing. Expect raw, working systems that solve the bottlenecks between shipping fast and deploying safely, with no slides allowed.

events.title: Wiki3: Own Your Own AI Workshop
events.description: Wiki3 AI Owners Group's inaugural meetup will bring together AI enthusiasts and builders for a hands-on workshop experience available both in-person and online.

events.title: O1 Strategy and Fireside
events.description: Founders, engineers, researchers, and community leaders will dig into O-1 visa strategies with speaker Karishma Mandal, covering how to build a compelling application and position your work for long-term impact. You'll network with others navigating the same path and get practical advice on strengthening your profile for the visa process.

events.title: The Epic of… Will O'Brien (Ulysses)
events.description: Will O'Brien of Ulysses—a team building autonomous ocean robots to restore seagrass meadows and revolutionize maritime labor—will take the stage for a live stress-test where he'll defend his sci-fi-grade vision against a skeptical crowd that literally votes on whether he wins them over. This isn't a pitch; it's 45 minutes of honest reckoning about what could actually kill the company, followed by audience interrogation.

events.title: Startup Pitch & Themed Networking San Francisco | Unlock Your Idea
events.description: Real founders and operators will break bread at themed tables while five live pitches take center stage, making this the kind of three-hour session where you'll actually test your ideas against people who've built something.

events.title: AI & Tech Networking Event by Ascent Valley
events.description: Ambitious founders, active investors, and AI experts will gather to pitch ideas, exchange feedback, and forge partnerships in a curated startup ecosystem—with selected founders getting stage time in front of venture capitalists and the winning pitch featured across a global network.

events.title: Alameda SaaS AI Group
events.description: Tech enthusiasts and SaaS professionals will explore the latest AI tools and innovations shaping the SaaS landscape through informal idea-sharing and presentations. The group will dive into real-world applications and emerging trends in the space.

events.title: Agent Builders Breakfast - Founders & Builders
events.description: Early morning gathering where founders, PMs, and engineering leaders building AI agents will swap war stories, demo what they're working on, and grab breakfast tacos while figuring out this whole agent-building thing together. Hosted by Michael Ducker, a seasoned PM who's shipped products at Mercury, Chime, and Twitter.

events.title: Scrappy AI Founders Play Pickleball (seed to series A)
events.description: A curated pickleball series where Bay Area founders and investors will compete in private matches with professional coaches, followed by dinner—bringing together early-stage founders who've hit seed stage or crossed $1M ARR.

events.title: The Engineering Roles That Will Matter In The AI Era
events.description: Three CTOs will dig into how AI is reshaping engineering teams in real time—discussing which roles are evolving, which are disappearing, and what skills actually matter when coding agents and autonomous testing enter the picture. This is a working conversation for engineers, founders, and leaders trying to figure out where their career or team needs to bet.

events.title: AI Founders & Global Scale: Why AI Companies Get Stuck When Expanding
events.description: AI founders will dive into the real challenges of scaling globally—from GTM strategies and user acquisition to payments infrastructure—with practical lessons from Kevin Zhang (Global GTM Director at Antom) and a roundtable of experienced operators tackling the messy parts that decks usually skip. Expect candid founder-to-founder conversations, open mic slots to pitch your work, and high-quality networking with fellow builders and growth leaders navigating international expansion.

events.title: Enterprise Agentic AI at the Edge
events.description: I'd be happy to help summarize an event, but it looks like the event description got cut off mid-sentence ("Join the Ca..."). Could you please provide the complete event description so I can create an accurate summary for you?

events.title: On-Device Night | Founders Building Local Agents
events.description: Founders will showcase live demos of on-device and edge AI models running on real hardware while getting feedback from judges spanning silicon, OEMs, and frontier labs—bringing together 100 builders, investors, and partners who are either already shipping AI at the edge or figuring out if they should be.

events.title: Can Agents Actually Self-Improve?
events.description: You'll build a real self-improving agent loop from scratch—simulating edge cases, scoring against evals, and gating releases so each version ships only if it actually performs better—led by Nikhil from Future AGI, who spends his days solving exactly this problem in production. Walk out with a working system built on open-source tools that runs on your laptop.

events.title: CISO Roundtable Dinner
events.description: Senior security leaders will gather for an intimate dinner where Caroline Wong—author of the Cybersecurity Canon Hall of Fame-inducted "Security Metrics" and former CISO at eBay, Symantec, and Cobalt—kicks off a candid roundtable conversation about AI risk, agent governance, and the evolving pressures of modern security leadership. It's a small-room peer discussion with no vendor pitches, just CISOs and their counterparts wrestling with what's actually keeping them up at night.

events.title: Private AI Founders Dinner feat. Partner at Left Lane Capital ($3.5B+ AUM)
events.description: AI founders will gather for an intimate dinner featuring a Left Lane Capital investor sharing perspectives on navigating fundraising and scaling in the AI space.

events.title: Sloptimist Etymologies with Adam Aleksic and Daniel Keller
events.description: Two internet culture experts—linguist and NYT bestselling author Adam Aleksic and internet theorist Daniel Keller—will dig into how AI-generated content and algorithmic culture are rewiring language, meaning, and taste in real time. This conversation explores the messy intersection of technology and culture alongside an exhibition examining meaning-making in the age of generative media.

events.title: AI for Social Good: Hack with MLH & DigitalOcean
events.description: MLH and DigitalOcean will be bringing together developers and AI enthusiasts for an intensive hackathon where you'll build real projects using cutting-edge AI tools while learning from industry experts and mentors. Whether you're a seasoned pro or just starting out, you'll have the chance to network with builders at all levels, grab free meals, and compete for some solid prizes.

events.title: Rewiring Biology Hackathon by Owkin
events.description: ML engineers, AI scientists, and computational biologists will spend two days building cutting-edge tools that supercharge biomedical discovery, creating MCP agents and workflows that extend AI capabilities for biological reasoning and hypothesis generation. Owkin's infrastructure and their AI Scientist K Pro provide a rare playground for exploring how AI genuinely accelerates research.

events.title: World's Largest Hermes Buildathon
events.description: Builders across AI engineers, founders, and growth operators will race to build, launch, and monetize AI agents in 8 hours, powered by OpenAI's GPT-5.5 credits, Convex's real-time backend, ElevenLabs' voice capabilities, and hosting from Cloudflare—all hosted by GrowthX's 200K-member AI community with mentorship from Okta's infrastructure lead and Tandem AI's go-to-market strategist.

events.title: The Fermi Qualifier (A) - 24hr Hack: $25K Cash + Nvidia Supercomputer
events.description: A high-stakes 24-hour qualifier hackathon focused on long-horizon agent reliability and judgment will bring together skilled AI developers competing for a $25,000 prize and an NVIDIA DGX Spark AI Supercomputer, with winners advancing to the prestigious Fermi Challenge Series offering a grand prize of $125,000 plus exclusive cohort access.

events.title: Humanity & AGI Summit 2026：Robotics for Future Civilization
events.description: Industry leaders and frontier tech innovators will converge to dissect the cutting-edge developments in embodied AI and robotics, exploring where the field is headed over the next several years. Whether you're an engineer, researcher, or investor, you'll get an early look at breakthrough capabilities and emerging opportunities reshaping the robotics ecosystem.

events.title: Bay Builders Hackathon
events.description: Builders will conceptualize and launch AI-powered startups across six tracks—from B2B SaaS tools and consumer apps to autonomous agents and industry-specific solutions—with over $100K in sponsor credits and cash prizes up for grabs. Teams will transform raw ideas into polished startup demos powered by AI, competing for recognition and rewards across categories like best use of InsForge, Band, and You.com's Web Search API.

events.title: Sports World Cup Hackathon
events.description: Developers, designers, and sports enthusiasts will build AI-powered sports solutions across five tracks—from athlete performance to fan engagement—during this 5-day online hackathon with top teams presenting live in San Francisco for cash prizes and sponsor awards. Backed by AIHouse and HiDevs, the event brings together founders and engineers to ship production-grade projects using cutting-edge AI tools and infrastructure.

events.title: Holo AI Night w/ NVIDIA & Black Forest Labs
events.description: Engineers and founders building AI will hear from builders at NVIDIA, Black Forest Labs, and H Company on what's actually shipping, then spend the evening networking with other builders who just wrapped a hackathon. It's a technical meetup designed to keep conversations real and the crowd small enough to actually connect.

events.title: Builders Night
events.description: Builders Night brings people together weekly to work on their projects side-by-side, whether that's software, hardware, creative work, or anything else—offering the accountability and momentum that's hard to generate alone. You'll spend focused time building in a warm, quiet space with moments to share what you've made, learn from others, and get unstuck together.

events.title: BioTech and Pharma Startups, Investors & Professionals Networking Event
events.description: Biotech and pharma founders, investors, and industry experts will converge to pitch innovations, explore funding opportunities, and forge strategic partnerships across drug development, AI-driven healthcare, and regulatory guidance. Expect rapid-fire elevator pitches, direct access to venture capitalists, and connections with researchers and commercialization specialists poised to accelerate breakthrough pharmaceutical solutions.

events.title: VB Transform 2026
events.description: Enterprise AI leaders from companies like Walmart, Visa, and Waymo will gather for two days of direct access to real deployment strategies, multi-agent systems architecture, and hands-on insights from the people actually shipping AI at scale—no vendor pitches, just peers solving the hardest problems together.

events.title: VB Transform 2026: Orchestrating AI Autonomy
events.description: Tech leaders and decision-makers will dive into orchestrating AI autonomy through research insights and hands-on roundtables covering agentic AI, LLM observability, and infrastructure strategies.

events.title: Trust Is the New Moat. The Hidden Buying and Investing Criteria for Enterprise AI. (w/ The AI Collective)
events.description: Builders will get insights into enterprise AI investment criteria straight from a managing partner at a seed-stage AI fund and a seasoned corporate risk officer, followed by hands-on work on real projects during this biweekly online session. Speakers bringing serious credentials—including founders with successful exits, enterprise infrastructure expertise, and AI planning pioneers—will explore how trust becomes the competitive advantage in enterprise AI before participants showcase their work.

events.title: Applied Frontier #1: Loop Engineering | Frontier Labs
events.description: Frontier Labs #1 will bring together AI engineers, founders, and researchers to dig into Loop Engineering—the technical architecture behind self-directing AI systems that plan, act, and improve across repeated cycles. This isn't your typical agent demo; expect deep dives into the hard problems like reliability, failure recovery, observability, and long-horizon execution that separate proof-of-concepts from systems that actually work in production.

events.title: AI Builders Night
events.description: AWS experts and builders will dive into cloud innovation and hands-on solutions at the Builders Loft, bringing real-world development experience to the table.

events.title: Show & Tell: AI for GTM @Notion with Baseten, Cognition and Samsara
events.description: Five seasoned GTM operators and engineers from Cognition, Baseten, Samsara, Notion, and Cresta will tear into their real, daily-use AI workflows—showing exactly how they built them, what they actually do, and what they'd change—with zero slides, pitches, or corporate theater. This will be pure tactical demonstrations of working AI tools and data flows that people are already shipping in production.

events.title: Nordic Founders Night
events.description: Nordic founders will gather to swap stories and make real connections while exploring the cutting edge of agentic AI, voice AI, robotics, and hardware—with a potential appearance from Mårten Mickos, the former MySQL and HackerOne CEO who's backed countless Nordic startups. Expect genuine conversations, fellow builders, and some impressive tech demos thrown into the mix.

events.title: AI Philosophy Nights: Indifferent Intelligence
events.description: Philosophers, technologists, and social scientists will gather for a fireside chat and salon discussions exploring why care might be the missing piece in AI alignment, with UC Berkeley philosopher B. Scot Rousse and executive coach Banu Kellner unpacking how we can design technology to preserve our capacity to actually give a damn.

events.title: Can AI Agents Be Morally Responsible?
events.description: A philosophy discussion will dig into whether AI systems can actually be morally responsible, examining cutting-edge arguments about blame and accountability in artificial agents.

events.title: Off the Record: A GTM Leader Private Dinner
events.description: Senior GTM leaders—including CMOs, VPs of Marketing, and RevOps heads from enterprise and mid-market B2B companies—will gather for an intimate dinner to discuss AI, go-to-market strategy, and revenue growth trends. This curated group keeps conversations substantive and networking purposeful.

events.title: Women in AI Breakfast and Panel
events.description: Women leaders from You.com, Cisco, Netflix, and Stanford will gather over breakfast to dig into AI trends, entrepreneurship, and navigating tech leadership while connecting with founders, investors, and operators building the future. You'll get real conversations on growth and balance alongside time to network with people actually doing the work in AI and startups.

events.title: Women Working Together - AI CoWork Day Edition
events.description: Spend the day building with seasoned pros—Amirah Raveneau-Bey (25+ years leading revenue and sales strategy at Zillow, Opendoor, NerdWallet, and Citibank) and Mari Zumbro (Filament Co-Founder and COO with expertise in AI workflows and platform building) will be holding open office hours to dive into whatever you're working on. Whether you're hammering out morning work or just stopping by for afternoon sessions, there's time to network, grab lunch, and get direct guidance from people who've scaled major companies.

events.title: Reading Group: Senior SWE-Bench
events.description: Snorkel AI's reading group will feature lead researcher Henry Ehrenberg diving into Senior SWE-Bench, an open-source benchmark that evaluates coding agents like actual senior engineers tackling real-world problems rather than simplified specs. You'll discover how this benchmark uses adaptive validation, sources tasks from genuine PRs with real debugging evidence, and why even frontier models like Claude Opus struggle to achieve meaningful solve rates on production-grade engineering work.

events.title: AWS Agentic AI Summit with MongoDB Mastra
events.description: AI experts and seasoned professionals will dive into cutting-edge machine learning applications and emerging AI trends during this hands-on session.

events.title: AI Lakehouse Meetup
events.description: Data engineers and architects will explore next-generation infrastructure, open table formats, and modern architectural frameworks designed to transform data systems.

events.title: AI Supply Chain Hackathon 2026: Food Banks + AI
events.description: Teams will brainstorm and build AI-powered solutions to tackle real supply chain disruption challenges during this hackathon. Participants will collaborate to create innovative approaches for improving supply chain resilience across industries.

events.title: Scrappy AI Founders Go Karting (seed to series A)
events.description: Twelve scrappy founders will tear up the go-kart track for some high-speed racing followed by dinner—a chance to network with seed to Series A+ founders and investors who actually know what they're doing.

events.title: Battle of the Paddles: AI Builders Edition
events.description: AI developers, architects, researchers, and leaders will gather for a casual evening of ping pong, food, and drinks—with an optional tournament for those looking to compete for prizes like a Ninja Creami and AirPods Pro.

events.title: PaperBench: Evaluating AI’s Ability to Replicate AI Research
events.description: Researchers and AI enthusiasts will dig into how well artificial intelligence can reconstruct academic papers from PDFs alone, with PaperBench putting AI's abilities to the ultimate test across code, experiments, and results.
events.venue: AGI House SF: 170 St. Germain Ave. San Francisco CA 94114

events.title: Fonzi's July Tech Talks
events.description: AI engineers will dive into building reliable systems for regulated industries, with DeepVerified breaking down how they're tackling RAG quality, agent workflows, and system observability for finance, healthcare, and legal applications. Expect technical talks on multi-PDF ingestion, agentic features, and evaluation frameworks alongside a crew of software developers, data scientists, and technical founders in the SF AI engineering scene.

events.title: Lightning AI Demo Night
events.description: Sanity and Entire will host an AI demo night featuring lightning talks from Melissa Herrera (Temporal), Amanda Martin (Vapi), and Knut Melvær (Sanity), complete with dumplings, drinks, and spirited debates around the latest in AI.

events.title: Startup Pitch & Themed Networking Palo Alto | Unlock Your Idea
events.description: Real founders will tear apart your ChatGPT-polished pitch while you eat at themed tables, then five brave souls will pitch live in front of a room full of people who actually know what they're doing.

events.title: AUTONOMOUS 2026 - The Future of Robotics & Physical AI
events.description: AUTONOMOUS will bring together 500 founders, engineers, investors, and enterprise operators in robotics and physical AI for a dynamic day of insights across two stages and four content tracks.

events.title: Agent Builders Breakfast - Founders & Builders
events.description: Founders and product leaders building AI agents will gather for casual breakfast conversations and impromptu demos with fellow builders navigating this space—hosted by Michael Ducker, an experienced PM from Mercury, Chime, and Twitter.

events.title: The Odyssey — Early Screening (Decagon x Baseten)
events.description: Experience Christopher Nolan's latest film on the big screen before its wide release, surrounded by engineers, founders, and fellow cinephiles while enjoying cocktails and appetizers. Baseten and Decagon—leaders in AI infrastructure and enterprise customer support—are hosting this intimate screening with zero formality and all the good vibes.

events.title: Design Meetup x Google Sunnyvale, CA: At Scale
events.description: Google designers from YouTube, Gemini, and Cloud AI will share insider workflows and career insights through lightning talks and a Q&A session with some seriously experienced folks (think Staff UX Designers and Senior Directors) diving into their recent project evolution. Early-to-mid career designers will get food, drinks, and real talk about leveling up in the field while networking with the team.

events.title: ElevenLabs x Sauna Hack Night
events.description: AI memory meets voice in a 90-minute build sprint where ElevenLabs and Sauna's founders will showcase agent tech and AI workflows, then watch startups hack together on real projects with live demos at the end.

events.title: PM Sandbox: AI Workflows for Competitive Analysis & Product Briefs
events.description: People will discover or launch their own communities to connect with others who are passionate about the same interests and hobbies.

events.title: Loop Engineering Hackathon
events.description: SF's builders will converge for an intense one-day engineering hackathon backed by AWS, Zero.xyz, Nexla, and Pomerium, with participants shipping real projects and pitching to a panel of seasoned engineers and founders. The lineup features industry pros like Nexla's CTO and Swipelux's co-founder, ready to judge what gets built.

events.title: Embodied Metal Hackathon
events.description: This three-day robotics hackathon brings together founders, developers, and AI researchers to build embodied intelligence systems that actually do something physical—whether that's sorting, folding, or entirely new robot behaviors you dream up. Backed by robotics experts, hardware labs, and world-model researchers, you'll get a real robot to hack with, training support, and compute resources to ship something that matters by Sunday.

events.title: AGI Summit 2026 | Where GenAI Converges · July 18–19 · Palace of Fine Arts
events.description: The AGI Summit 2026 will bring together top researchers from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind alongside operators at Microsoft, Meta, and NVIDIA to explore how AI is shifting from assistance to autonomous execution—featuring deep dives into agent orchestration, autonomous workflows, and systems already generating real value. Founders building next-gen AI products will get direct access to investors from Sequoia, a16z, and Lightspeed, with opportunities to pitch on the main stage.

events.title: DeepLearning.AI Voice AI Hackathon: The Complete Trip
events.description: Build a voice AI agent that orchestrates the chaos of travel booking—flights, hotels, rideshares, dining, everything—into one seamless conversation, with industry heavyweights like Andrew Ng and the CEO of Vocal Bridge judging your work and $5000 in prizes on the line. Teams will spend the day hacking with Sabre APIs and Vocal Bridge tech to create agents that actually speak and act, not just chat.

events.title: AI Valley x Pet Zen Dog-a-thon
events.description: 200 developers, designers, and animal advocates will spend a day building real tools for rescue operations and dog adoption—with actual rescue dogs on-site to meet in the morning and inspire the afternoon's builds. Teams will compete for $10K+ in prizes while working directly with shelter partners on adoption matching systems, volunteer coordination, and AI solutions that actually help dogs find homes.

events.title: GenAI Summit SF 2026 — The World's Largest Generative AI Conference
events.description: The GenAI Summit SF 2026 will gather leading experts in generative AI for two days of cutting-edge innovation and collaboration.

events.title: Scrappy AI Founders Go Mountain Biking
events.description: Eight AI founders and early-stage investors will tear through South Bay trails on a 3-hour mountain bike ride followed by lunch—a chance for seed to Series A founders doing $1M+ ARR to connect while getting some serious endurance in.

events.title: AGI Summit 2026 Hackathon
events.description: Builders and AI innovators will tackle autonomous intelligence in a 2-day hackathon, shipping AI agents, multi-agent systems, and autonomous workflows while competing for up to $1,000 in prizes. Engineers, founders, and researchers will collaborate to create the next generation of AI-native products across coding, finance, healthcare, and beyond.

events.title: Bay Area AI War Room - SF Edition - Saturday, 10:00 AM
events.description: A forward-thinking roundtable will explore where AI is headed in 2026, bringing together experts across models, ethics, law, business, and creative fields to debate everything from Claude's expanding capabilities to real-world impact.

events.title: Build Beautifully: Beginner Claude Code Workshop 1 for Women
events.description: Build Beautifully kicks off with "Hello, Build," a beginner-friendly workshop guiding participants through setting up a developer environment and creating a live personal website using Claude Code, perfect for women stepping confidently into tech without prior experience.

events.title: The Future of Agentic AI in Healthcare - Abridge x Anthropic x Lightspeed
events.description: Top ML scientists and clinical engineers from Abridge, Anthropic, and Lightspeed will guide you through building AI agents that tackle real healthcare automation challenges affecting 300+ health systems, from clinical trial matching to prior authorization. You'll get direct feedback from actual clinicians and potentially ship production-ready solutions addressing some of healthcare's most pressing workflow problems.

events.title: Builders Night
events.description: People will show up with whatever they're building—software, hardware, businesses, creative projects, you name it—and spend the evening doing focused work alongside others who get that building can be isolating and momentum matters. It's a warm, mostly quiet space punctuated by real moments of connection when someone breaks through a blocker or discovers something worth sharing.

events.title: Foundry Live: Agentic AI Demo Night
events.description: Bay Area startups will showcase cutting-edge agentic AI applications that are reshaping how autonomous systems operate across industries. Attendees will witness firsthand the transformative potential of AI agents through live demos from innovators pushing the boundaries of what's possible.

events.title: Claude Code Demos: Building the State of the Art
events.description: Builders working with agentic AI tools will gather for live demos and open working sessions where they'll share actual workflows, compare setups, and learn directly from others actively shipping with Claude Code, Cursor, and custom agents. It's a twice-monthly chance to move beyond isolated tinkering and get unfiltered insights on what works and what breaks in real agentic development.

events.title: AMD Advancing AI 2026
events.description: Dive into 50+ hands-on workshops led by industry heavyweights like the PyTorch Foundation's Global CTO and UCLA professors, while connecting with AI builders and AMD leadership to level up your skills in scaling AI systems. Walk away with practical tools, community connections, and a shot at winning AMD hardware and AI PCs.

events.title: AMD Advancing AI 2026 | San Francisco, July 22-23
events.description: Cutting-edge AI infrastructure and development will take center stage as leading researchers and open-source project leaders gather to share insights on building with AMD platforms and popular AI frameworks, complete with free training, GPU resources, and certification opportunities.

events.title: Investors Breakfast: GTM in the Age of AI
events.description: Founders, operators, and investors will gather for candid conversations about AI-driven go-to-market strategies, featuring a panel with leaders from Zentāra Ventures, AGI Inc, and Cisco who'll share insights on transforming sales and marketing with AI. This intimate breakfast will deliver real networking focused on building relationships and actionable learnings for anyone launching products, scaling revenue, or staying ahead in the AI ecosystem.

events.title: Dwarkesh Unplugged, presented by WorkOS
events.description: Dwarkesh Patel will sit down with Dr. Fei-Fei Li, co-founder and CEO of World Labs, to dig into the tech and AI forces reshaping the future, while WorkOS founder Michael Grinich flips the script to explore how Dwarkesh built one of tech's most compelling podcasts. Space is limited for this conversation happening July 22.

events.title: AI as a Force Multiplier: Scaling Lean Finance Teams Without Adding Headcount
events.description: Venture-backed CFOs will dive into how AI is transforming lean finance teams—from automating closes and FP&A to flagging anomalies in real time—with seasoned operators including heads of finance from Obsidian Security and Centific, plus an operating partner from Bessemer Venture Partners sharing practical playbooks. Walk away with frameworks to implement immediately and understand what investors now expect around AI maturity and finance function efficiency.

events.title: Startup Tech & AI Networking
events.description: Tech professionals, investors, and entrepreneurs will connect to explore innovation and forge meaningful partnerships in the industry.

events.title: Geospatial AI Happy Hour GeoMeetup
events.description: Geospatial AI enthusiasts and professionals will gather for a GeoMeetup happy hour where Terrabyte.ai will showcase cutting-edge developments in geospatial technology. The event will bring together industry experts and practitioners looking to network and discuss the latest innovations in the field.

events.title: Scrappy AI Founders Play Pickleball (Seed to Series A)
events.description: Early-stage founders and investors will compete in curated pickleball matchups with professional coaching and private courts, wrapping up with networking over dinner.

events.title: AI Engineering Leaders Dinner/Networking/Talks
events.description: Over 40 seasoned CTOs and engineering leaders will gather for raw, unfiltered conversations about what's actually happening in modern software teams—no fluff, just real talk with folks from Stripe, GitHub, Supabase, and other major players. Expect solid networking, short talks, food and drinks in a deliberately curated setting where the focus is on honest dialogue about engineering challenges that matter right now.

events.title: Agent Swarms Hackathon
events.description: Builders and AI engineers will spend a day cranking out the next generation of agentic systems with mentorship from top teams at DeepMind, Guild AI, and Pioneer, complete with talks, prizes, and live demos. You'll get hands-on experience with cutting-edge inference and control plane tools while competing for recognition alongside industry experts serving as judges.

events.title: You.com Agentic AI Hackathon
events.description: Build agentic AI systems powered by live web data in a single day at this SF hackathon where You.com engineers are hands-on the entire time, competing across three tracks (Real-Time Intelligence, Deep Knowledge, or Agent Systems) with top teams winning API credits, Amazon vouchers, and mentorship from You.com leadership. Geared toward shipped builders and indie hackers who can prototype and demo within 24 hours.

events.title: Build Fast. Launch Loud. Prompt Driven Hackathon
events.description: The Prompt Driven Development x Deskree Hackathon will propel developers, students, and founders to rapidly build and launch AI-powered applications using innovative prompt-based workflows and robust backend infrastructure, culminating in live demos and pitches to industry leaders and investors.

events.title: Series #2 Founder OS: Automate with Claude, Lead with Trust
events.description: Founders will get hands-on building a Claude-powered Chief of Staff system customized to their company, then dive deep into the psychology and culture shifts needed so their team actually adopts it instead of resisting it. Led by Pooja Kalita (12+ years shipping SaaS at Microsoft and Splunk) and Uma Uppin (founder of Tathya.ai, somatic coach and systems thinker), you'll walk away with a working setup ready to use tomorrow plus a practical playbook grounded in your values for rolling this out to your team.

events.title: Builders Night
events.description: People building software, hardware, businesses, or creative projects will gather weekly to work side-by-side in focused sprints, breaking isolation with moments of genuine connection and mutual support when someone cracks a tough problem. It's the antidote to lonely building—showing up consistently alongside others who are trying to make something real.

events.title: Enterprise AI at Scale: Talks + AI Agent Workshops
events.description: TechEquity Ai's upcoming forum will spotlight AI executives, startup founders, and developers navigating rapid growth and scaling AI-native companies through keynotes and hands-on workshops, ideal for professionals seeking practical insights on AI product journeys and resilience.

events.title: Agents and APIs Developer Meetup
events.description: Developers will explore AI-native software design patterns and practical agent implementations with industry experts including the co-founder of Pipecat, a Postman staff engineer, and founders from YC-backed startups, diving into how the next generation of software will leverage LLMs and their capabilities.

events.title: Scaling revenue at Stripe and Vercel with Jeanne DeWitt Grosser (COO, Vercel)
events.description: Jeanne DeWitt Grosser, who scaled Stripe's revenue engine and now leads go-to-market as COO at Vercel, will sit down with Baseten's president for an unfiltered conversation on scaling revenue in AI-native companies. You'll hear directly from someone who's turned developer tools into internet infrastructure twice over.

events.title: Agentic AI Summit 2026
events.description: Over 5,000 attendees and global livestream viewers will converge for a two-day deep dive into Agentic AI, where academics, industry leaders, and policymakers will tackle the latest breakthroughs in AI infrastructure and real-world deployment strategies.

events.description: The event will dive into the future of reasoning models, exploring their intersections with ethics, law, business, and art, led by experts in AI, systems, and legal frameworks.

events.description: You'll spend your evening building side-by-side with other makers—software engineers, designers, artists, and entrepreneurs—in focused sprints where the work itself is what matters, followed by a share-back where you'll trade learnings and get unstuck together. It's the antidote to solo building: show up with a project, leave with real momentum and the energy of working alongside people who actually get it.

events.title: Claude Code Demos: Building the State of the Art
events.description: Builders actively using agentic tools will swap real workflows and setups during live demos, then spend the evening collaborating on actual projects to solve shared problems. events.title: Builders Night

It's a warm, quiet space where the work itself is the main event, punctuated by a share-back where builders swap what they learned and offer support to each other.

events.title: AI Tinkerers Raleigh Meetup — August 12, 2026 [AI Tinkerers - Raleigh]

events.title: Builders Night

events.title: Builders Night

It's a warm, intentional space built for makers who need accountability and connection—not networking—with time for deep work and real feedback from fellow builders.

events.title: abstract by convex
events.description: Software engineers and architects will dive into why design principles matter more than ever as coding becomes commoditized, exploring how simplicity and elegant abstractions separate great projects from the rest.

events.description: Crescendo Live San Francisco 2026 will gather seasoned CX leaders and AI experts like James Green and Hemant Taneja to reveal practical AI strategies that redefine customer experience standards, blending automation with human insight for faster, more empathetic service. This full-day event will feature hands-on workshops, breakout sessions, and real-world stories from top professionals driving AI-powered CX transformations.

events.description: Festiverse 2026 will gather a vibrant mix of builders, designers, founders, artists, and engineers to innovate the future of festivals through AI, AR, and immersive tech, reimagining how we celebrate cultural moments worldwide. This global hackathon promises groundbreaking creations from AI planners to virtual celebration platforms that will transform holiday experiences.

events.title: AI Loves Data - GenAI and Intelligent Agents in the Enterprise
events.description: Data science leaders and AI researchers will converge for curated sessions exploring how machine learning drives enterprise innovation, with senior executives and top local talent diving into predictive analytics and real-world AI implementations.

events.title: QCon 2026: Senior Software Engineering Conference
events.description: QCon 2026 will bring senior engineers from top tech companies together for five days of deep dives into AI in production, software architecture, leadership, and modern development practices, sharing real-world insights from successful large-scale implementations. This event will feature candid sessions by experienced practitioners and hands-on training designed to elevate strategic and practical skills in engineering leadership and system design.

events.title: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
events.description: The Fortieth Annual Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems will bring together leading researchers and practitioners to discuss cutting-edge advances in deep learning, machine learning, and AI. Top-tier academics and industry experts will showcase groundbreaking work spanning neural architectures, optimization, and real-world applications.
